nasb.text: When Eli heard the noise of the outcry, he said, “What does the noise of this commotion mean?” Then the man came hurriedly and told Eli.

esv.text: When Eli heard the sound of the outcry, he said, “What is this uproar?” Then the man hurried and came and told Eli.

cnv.text: 以利聽見喊叫的聲音，就問：“這喧嚷的聲音是甚麼意思呢？”那人急忙前來，向以利報告。

ccb.text: 以利听见哭喊声，就问：“人们为何喊叫？”那人赶忙告诉他。
